brainstorm.emptySessions: No sessions yet — start your first brainstorm.
brainstorm.intro: Develop your idea through conversation — suggestions for the concept, characters, world, and plot threads collect in the AI panel on the right.
brainstorm.sessionCostTitle: Estimated total cost of this brainstorm session per official price lists (as if via API). ~ marks estimated tokens.
brainstorm.starterWithMaterial: The project already has an outline — the AI will base the conversation on your concept and story bible.
brainstorm.starterNoMaterial: You can start with anything — a single image, emotion, or question. And if you have nothing, the AI will propose starting points.
brainstorm.starterButton: I have no idea — propose starters
brainstorm.messageCostTitle: Estimated cost of this reply per the official price list (as if via API).
brainstorm.composerPlaceholder: Describe an idea or doubt, or ask a question…
brainstorm.emptyDescription: Create a session and develop your idea in conversation with the AI — even without the slightest outline. Turn conclusions into concept fields, characters, world elements, and plot threads with a single click.
brainstorm.confirmDeleteSession: Delete the session along with the whole conversation and suggestions?
brainstorm.generateTitle: Add the full proposal to the AI queue
brainstorm.fieldSeed: Help me develop the „{{field}}” field for „{{entity}}”. Current content: {{value}}. Propose concrete ideas, variants, and questions to deepen it.
brainstorm.fieldSeedNoEntity: Help me develop the „{{field}}” field. Current content: {{value}}. Propose concrete ideas, variants, and questions to deepen it.
brainstorm.fieldSeedEmpty: The „{{field}}” field for „{{entity}}” is still empty — suggest what could go in it.
brainstorm.fieldSeedEmptyNoEntity: The „{{field}}” field is still empty — suggest what could go in it.
